content:
✔ Only one student may hold this role per semester.
✔ They can nullify one curse every three weeks (must be used strategically).
✔ After nullifying a curse, they suffer a debuff the following week (weakened in certain skill checks).

📜 The Purifier’s Skill Check for Nullification
✔ To successfully nullify a curse, the Purifier must complete a ritual-based challenge (e.g., solving a literary puzzle, passing a logic test, or completing a persuasive argument).
✔ If they fail the skill check, the curse remains active, and the Purifier receives a double debuff.

📜 Example: The Purifier in Action
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 337 (chunk 337/555)
